lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor rust spots. The interior shows signs of regular use, including fading and small stains on the upholstery. All mechanical systems are functional.

This vehicle is in exceptional, mint condition, presenting as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. It has been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint is flawless, devoid of any chips or scratches, and the interior retains its original factory scent with no signs of wear on the leather upholstery. All mechanical components and electronic features function perfectly. A buyer can expect a vehicle that requires absolutely no immediate investment or repairs, offering a truly premium driving experience.

Step into luxury with this absolutely stunning vehicle that is in pristine, mint condition! It looks and feels as if it just rolled off the showroom floor, with a flawless exterior and an interior that is virtually untouched. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car in truly exceptional shape. Don't miss out on the chance to own this impeccably maintained gem!
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several rust patches on the wheel wells, a large dent in the driver-side door, and a cracked windshield that needs replacement. Inside, the upholstery is torn in several places, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. Mechanically, the engine starts but has a noticeable knock, and the transmission has begun to slip during gear changes. This car is being sold as-is and would be best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical components require repair and maintenance.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a refined interior and a robust mechanical profile, it offers a confident driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. A premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber automobile at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it's totally ready to hit the road with a new owner right away. If you're looking for something reliable that still looks great and drives smooth, this is definitely the one for you. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it just as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

This E92-generation M3 is a formidable example of high-revving atmospheric performance, powered by the S65 4.0L V8 featuring individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. The powertrain is mated to a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission, delivering torque through a variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. This specimen remains mechanically robust, with recent preventative maintenance including rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator servicing to ensure long-term reliability. The chassis retains its factory-spec Electronic Damper Control (EDC), providing exceptional lateral stability and communicative steering rack feedback. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina consistent with its 'good' classification, the subframe and suspension geometry remain true, offering a visceral, analog driving experience that modern turbocharged equivalents cannot replicate.
Used vehicle in good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and pride of ownership. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a dashboard where every button, dial, and digital display functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. The transmission provides crisp, seamless shifts, and the suspension remains firm yet comfortable for daily commutes. Equipped with a premium sound system, dual-zone climate control, and tires with substantial tread life remaining, this car is fully prepared for its next owner. It is a reliable, turn-key choice for anyone seeking a high-quality driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, characterized by consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic. Having undergone a thorough inspection, it stands as a testament to attentive ownership and remains a sophisticated choice for the discerning motorist seeking both value and performance.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. An exceptional opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner today. It's perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend adventures! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of the S54-powered icon. The 3.2L high-revving inline-six utilizes individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock. The chassis has been addressed with rear subframe reinforcement and features a MacPherson strut front/multi-link rear suspension setup for precise turn-in. Maintenance is up to date, including a cooling system refresh and recent valve adjustment. Presenting in honest condition with minor cosmetic wear, it remains a performance-first machine with excellent throttle response and communicative hydraulic steering feedback.
Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Service records available.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and luxury. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with regular highway use. Inside, the premium leather upholstery has been regularly conditioned and shows only slight softening on the driver-side bolster. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound, backed by a comprehensive service portfolio. Recent maintenance includes a fresh synthetic oil service and a multi-point inspection confirming the engine and transmission are in excellent working order. The tires offer significant tread life, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a reliable, high-quality daily driver that has been cared for with an eye for detail.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure compliance with our rigorous standards of performance and reliability. A distinguished choice for those who prioritize value without compromising on excellence.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic discipline. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this unit remains in commendable condition, offering a sophisticated driving experience and enduring value for its next owner.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolute gold to own. It’s in really solid condition and has been well-loved—runs like a beauty and looks great too! You might see a little character from normal use, but it’s super reliable and ready for its next adventure. I’d love for this to go to a good home, so come check it out and see for yourself!

Meticulously maintained and ready for its next chapter, this vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor, expected signs of careful use that come with a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of cleanliness; the upholstery is supple, the dashboard is free of sun damage, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a solid, dependable choice for a buyer who values a vehicle that has been treated with respect and is prepared for many more miles of reliable service.

This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a balanced blend of performance and comfort, it stands as a testament to responsible ownership. We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this model exhibits commendable mechanical integrity and a refined exterior presence. It represents an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber driving experience without the premium of a showroom-new price point. This vehicle stands as a testament to conscientious ownership and remains in excellent operational standing.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect choice if you're looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure! I’d love to see it go to a good home, so feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system for optimized valve timing across the power band. Power is delivered through a tactile Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory-spec limited-slip differential, ensuring exceptional corner-exit traction. The chassis maintains high torsional rigidity, with the critical rear subframe reinforcement already addressed. Suspension kinematics remain sharp, utilizing MacPherson struts up front and a multi-link rear setup for precise damping and feedback. While the aesthetic reflects its status as a driven enthusiast car, the mechanical vitals—including rod bearings and cooling system—have been meticulously maintained to preserve the platform's legendary longitudinal and lateral dynamics.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Mechanically sound. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability, offering a premium driving experience. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only minor signs of road use consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin remains a sanctuary; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, while every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system—functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. We have kept comprehensive service records documenting recent fluid flushes and filter changes. It drives straight and true, offering a firm yet comfortable ride that inspires confidence on both city streets and long highway stretches. This car has been a reliable companion and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately with no mechanical work required.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier selection within our current inventory, characterized by its commendable mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained throughout its tenure, the automobile offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term value. Prospective owners will appreciate the refined cabin and the vehicle's reliable history, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. This is an exemplary choice for the discerning buyer seeking quality and dependability.
